full_text:
Tu’an 土安
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Tu’an (土安). Defeats Shu army 15 times but it is all a ploy to make Nanman careless. Tu’an is a fictional character. Tu’an was affiliated with Nanman. Tu’an lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
